## Source: amazon-inspector (a3da27e815b33bf88dc4fb31bc8b5558501b65ded9de77aab08e7ae785c2c38b)
The package mw-filesystem-events-nodream was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (de8207d2ceae0bddf174a97bcdf63bbf4d758383fabd8f642818c858cd6fca67)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'mw-filesystem-events-nodream' @ 0.0.32 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
